implementation_phase: Phase 2+ bundled implementation: entry workflows call reusable workflow modules; reusable modules call local composite actions for shared mechanics.

workflow_contracts.target_architecture: Entry workflow plus a family-specific reusable apply-in workflow and script-backed manifest, hash, path, and workflow-change validation. Implementation update: entry workflow now calls a repo-local reusable workflow module; shared setup, artifact upload, validation, packaging, and report mechanics are routed through local composite actions where applicable.

workflow_contracts.acceptance_evidence: Request schema validation, target-branch readback, stale-base hash checks, one-file patch guard, dry-run/apply behavior, artifact report, pushed target-branch commit, and central completed-run report.
workflow_contracts.rollback: Disable or remove the ops apply-patch workflow pair and continue using chatgpt-apply-in for full-file payloads until a corrected bounded patch lane is restored.
workflow_contracts.target_architecture: Entry workflow plus a family-specific reusable apply-patch workflow and script-backed request, branch, path, hash, patch-shape, workflow-target, artifact, and push validation. The entry workflow owns triggers, permissions, concurrency, and operator-visible contract notes.

workflow_contracts.acceptance_evidence: Workflow dispatch and PR/push path-filter readback showing Windows PowerShell 5.1 version, parser validation success, and ChatGPT workflow report section artifact.
workflow_contracts.rollback: Remove the Windows PowerShell 5.1 entry/reusable workflow pair and use the existing validate-powershell-syntax action through validate-on-pr until a corrected compatibility lane is restored.
workflow_contracts.target_architecture: Entry workflow plus reusable Windows PowerShell 5.1 validation workflow that runs on windows-latest, confirms Windows PowerShell Desktop 5.1, validates parser compatibility, writes a ChatGPT workflow report section, and uploads the report artifact.

workflow_contracts.acceptance_evidence: Workflow dispatch and PR/push readback showing CodeQL init/analyze completion for supported languages, uploaded code scanning results, and ChatGPT workflow report section artifacts.
workflow_contracts.rollback: Disable or remove the CodeQL entry/reusable workflow pair and rely on dependency-review plus local Codex static checks until CodeQL configuration is corrected.
workflow_contracts.target_architecture: Entry workflow plus reusable CodeQL security workflow using GitHub CodeQL Action v4 for Python and GitHub Actions workflow surfaces with security-extended and security-and-quality query suites.

workflow_contracts.acceptance_evidence: Manual comment-triggered run readback, reusable workflow invocation, trusted default-branch checkout behavior, operator command guard, token/config-name-only handling, optional debug progress/status comment evidence, model-stack config readback, connector-safe file-size manifest, and PR conversation output evidence.
workflow_contracts.rollback: Restore the prior inline DCOIR Review workflow body and remove reusable-openrouter-pr-review.yml if the reusable module breaks trusted comment-triggered review behavior.
workflow_contracts.target_architecture: Thin comment-triggered entry workflow plus reusable DCOIR Review module. The entry workflow keeps the issue_comment trigger, concurrency, operator guard, explicit permissions, and explicit secret forwarding visible; reusable-openrouter-pr-review.yml owns the trusted default-branch checkout, static context readback, progress/status comments, model-stack config, debug artifacts, and script invocation.
